text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen—a Grand Prix race that serves as
a fitting stage to determine the greatest
Umamusume of the year.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I just came to wish you luck.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I thought for sure you'd be running today. Are
you really okay with just watching?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I'm not ready yet. I couldn't win the Queen
Elizabeth II Cup, so I want to focus on getting
stronger for now.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
I have to make sure I can beat you the next time
we race.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
So I want to make sure you're ready to put up a
fight today. I don't want you to lose, not even to
the person I respect most.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I want a rival so great, they can even
surpass the person I most look up to.

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Woooo! Go, Teio!
You've got this in the baaaag!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ta-dah! You're up against me today, Sweep! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Haha. ♪ Well, y'know, I've been wanting to race
you.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So c'mon! Show me that magic one more time.
Let's see who's stronger—Classic Triple Crown
tour runners or Triple Tiara tour runners?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Strength is strength and that's that!
